strategy_description: Go fully long SPY when signal is bullish; move to cash otherwise.
notes: Backfilled 2026-04-23 from tournament_results_20260314.csv per Wave 10I.A; OOS dates reconstructed from default monthly/daily windows. Fields: signal_column=vix_vix3m_ratio_z126, threshold_rule=lt (inferred from T2_rp75 + direction=countercyclical), strategy_family=P1_long_cash, oos_n_trades=1566 (from tournament CSV oos_n column — period count, not discrete trade count), OOS window 2015-01-01..2025-12-31 (daily default reconstruction).
